title: Dekton Dent Puller & Suction Cup | Heavy-Duty Suction, Holds Up to 30kg | Quick Release Handle for Easy Use | High Impact Nylon Construction | Perfect for Pulling Dents & Carrying Large Flat Objects
features: Powerful Suction for Heavy Lifting: The Dekton Dent Puller and Suction Cup features a heavy-duty suction cup capable of holding up to 30kg, making it ideal for pulling dents from vehicles and carrying large, flat objects like glass, metal sheets, or tiles. Its strong grip provides a reliable solution for demanding tasks, whether you're in the garage, workshop, or on the job site.

Durable High-Impact Nylon Construction: Built with high-impact nylon, this dent puller is designed for durability and long-lasting use. Its rugged construction ensures it can withstand tough jobs without cracking or breaking, offering both strength and stability. Perfect for repeated use, this tool is suitable for both professional mechanics and DIY enthusiasts.

Quick-Release Handle for Easy Operation: The Dekton Dent Puller is equipped with a quick-release handle, allowing you to easily engage and disengage the suction cup as needed. This feature ensures fast, hassle-free operation, whether you're pulling dents or lifting heavy flat objects. The intuitive design saves time and effort, making your tasks more efficient.

Versatile Tool for Dent Removal & Object Handling: Designed not only for pulling dents, this suction cup is a versatile tool for various applications. Use it to carry large, smooth objects such as windows, mirrors, or countertops with ease. Its strong suction grip makes handling awkward, flat items safer and more manageable, minimizing the risk of damage during transport.

Secure Grip in Tight Spaces: The compact design of the Dekton Dent Puller allows you to access and pull out dents in tight or hard-to-reach areas on vehicles or machinery. Its heavy-duty suction cup ensures a firm grip on smooth surfaces, offering precision and control for dent removal tasks without damaging the surface of the material.
description: The Dekton Dent Puller and Suction Cup is a must-have tool for anyone needing to remove dents or handle large, flat objects. With a heavy-duty suction cup that holds up to 30kg, this tool provides the strength and grip needed for demanding tasks. Its high-impact nylon construction ensures durability and reliability, making it suitable for both professional and home use. The quick-release handle allows for easy and efficient operation, whether you're pulling dents from vehicles or lifting objects like glass or metal sheets. Designed for versatility, this suction cup tool can be used for a variety of tasks, from vehicle repairs to moving heavy, smooth-surfaced items. Compact and easy to maneuver, it provides secure handling, even in tight spaces, making it an essential addition to your tool kit.
